home.headline: TOGETHER IN
home.subline: A memory game to celebrate the history and work of the Federados Agricultural Cooperative.

features.cognitiveDesc: Sync your biological rhythms with the seasonal cycles of the Memory Fields.
features.siloDesc: Collect ancestral artifacts and achieve agrarian excellence.
features.cognitiveDesc1: Your first harvests are taking root. The soil is beginning to remember.
features.cognitiveDesc2: You have reached the peak. The legacy of your harvests echoes across all fields.
features.noMedalsYet: Play games to unlock your first medal

footer.copyright: 2026 developed by Marqui :). All rights cultivated.

difficulty.title: Choose level
difficulty.subtitle: Select a difficulty and test your memory.

easy.label: Easy
easy.description: Small grid and generous time. Perfect for beginners.

medium.label: Medium
medium.description: The standard challenge. More pairs and limited time.

hard.label: Hard
hard.description: Large grid and few attempts. Experts only.

game.hint: Match all fertile soil blocks to complete the harvest.

exit.title: Abandon game?
exit.message: Your progress will be saved. You can continue from where you left off.

win.title: Harvest Complete
win.subtitle: Your memory has nourished the soil.

lose.title: Crop Failed
lose.subtitle: The frost claimed the memories before harvest.

leaderboard.title: Rankings
leaderboard.subtitle: Top 10 harvesters across all difficulty levels.
leaderboard.empty: No harvests recorded yet. Be the first!

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Cooperativa Agropecuaria de Acopiadores Federados Limitada
about.whoBody: The Cooperativa Agropecuaria de Acopiadores Federados Limitada unites grain and oilseed collection companies who, through cooperative action, strengthen their commercial participation. The primary goal is to increase the profitability and competitiveness of its members by providing comprehensive service across all stages of commercialization.
benefits: Greater scale means greater negotiating power with suppliers.
Creation of vertical integration structures with scale-controlled costs.
Ability to develop proprietary brand products.
Enabling the incorporation of new business lines into our operations.
Improving value-added generation on commercialized products.
Building and expanding commercial networks across member regions.
about.servicesBody: Advisory services, training, registrations, courses and programs in national and international quality management systems, certifiable standards and applicable regulations. Transportation, registrations, and quotes.
about.memoryBody: A playful experience designed to connect members with the cooperative's values. Train your memory while exploring the CAAF universe.

achievements.sectionSubtitle: Unlock medals by reaching milestones in your harvests.

cosecha_express.name: Cosecha Exprés
cosecha_express.desc: Win a game in under 20 seconds.

horizonte_despejado.name: Horizonte Despejado
horizonte_despejado.desc: Reach the top 3 on any ranking.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: CAAF Memory does not require personal data to work. Here we explain what we store and why.

noPersonal.title: No personal data
noPersonal.body: We don't ask for your email, phone number, address or any personally identifying information. The only data you enter is a nickname of your choice and a representative icon, both publicly visible on the ranking.

collected.title: What we store
collected.body: We store your game name, chosen icon, scores and game statistics (time, errors, difficulty, outcome). We also record the date of your last session and whether you shared a result. This information is stored in Firebase Firestore linked to an anonymous identifier generated by your device.

purpose.title: How we use the data
purpose.body: Data is used exclusively to display the ranking between CAAF congress participants and to allow the organizing team to view participation statistics. It is not shared with third parties or used for advertising purposes.

deletion.title: Data deletion
deletion.body: You can sign out from Settings at any time. This removes your profile from the device. To delete your data from the server, contact the congress organizing team.

privacy.footerNote: CAAF Memory is an experience designed for the Cooperativa Agropecuaria de Acopiadores Federados Limitada congress. Collected data is valid exclusively during the event.

share.title: Share App
share.subtitle: Others can scan this to join the game
